units.content: a non-transitory computer-readable medium exists as the claimed subject matter
execution of instructions by one or more processors causes the processors to perform a method
one or more processors execute the carried instructions
the processors perform the method of any one of claims 13, 14, 15, 16, or 16a
claim 17 incorporates by reference the method steps of claims 13 through 16a as the operative functional scope
the medium claim is a Beauregard-style claim providing medium-based patent coverage for the incorporated method claims
